metadata.title: Local Backup
metadata.description: Automatically creates a local backup of the vault.

regex.source: Notice(`Please reconfigure \`Local Backup\` after upgrading to ${this.manifest.version}!`, 1e4)
regex.target: Notice(`请重新配置 \`本地备份\` 在升级到 ${this.manifest.version}!`, 1e4)

regex.source: Notice(`Failed to create vault backup after ${maxRetries} attempts: ${error}`)
regex.target: Notice(`创建保管库备份失败了 ${maxRetries} attempts: ${error}`)

regex.source: .error("Failed to create file by WinRAR:", error)
regex.target: .error("Failed to create file by WinRAR:", error)

regex.source: .error("Failed to create file by Bandizip:", error)
regex.target: .error("Failed to create file by Bandizip:", error)

regex.source: .error(`Failed to create vault backup after ${maxRetries} attempts.`)
regex.target: .error(`Failed to create vault backup after ${maxRetries} attempts.`)
.setName("通过调用外部文件归档进行备份")

regex.source: .setDesc("Run local backup once on Obsidian starts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Run local backup once on Obsidian starts.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Setup a Windows backup storage path. eg. D:\\documents\\Obsidian")
regex.target: .setDesc("Setup a Windows backup storage path. eg. D:\\documents\\Obsidian")

regex.source: .setDesc("Setup a Unix backup storage path. eg. /home/user/Documents/Obsidian")
regex.target: .setDesc("Setup a Unix backup storage path. eg. /home/user/Documents/Obsidian")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable to create backups at regular intervals")
regex.target: .setDesc("Enable to create backups at regular intervals")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the frequency of backups in minutes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Set the frequency of backups in minutes.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the retry times after backup failed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Set the retry times after backup failed.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Setup a Windows one-way backup storage path. eg. D:\\documents\\OneWayBackup")
regex.target: .setDesc("Setup a Windows one-way backup storage path. eg. D:\\documents\\OneWayBackup")

regex.source: .setDesc("Setup a Unix one-way backup storage path. eg. /home/user/Documents/OneWayBackup")
regex.target: .setDesc("Setup a Unix one-way backup storage path. eg. /home/user/Documents/OneWayBackup")

regex.source: .setDesc("If toggled, backups will be created by calling external file archiver.")
regex.target: .setDesc("If toggled, backups will be created by calling external file archiver.")

regex.source: .setDesc("The selected archiver must be installed. eg. 7-Zip for Windows, 7-Zip/p7zip for Unix")
regex.target: .setDesc("The selected archiver must be installed. eg. 7-Zip for Windows, 7-Zip/p7zip for Unix")

regex.source: .setDesc("Full path of Archiver. eg. D:\\software\\7-Zip\\7z.exe for Windows. Using bz.exe (Bandizip) for Windows is recommended.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Full path of Archiver. eg. D:\\software\\7-Zip\\7z.exe for Windows. Using bz.exe (Bandizip) for Windows is recommended.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Full path of Archiver. eg. /usr/bin/7z or 7z for Unix.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Full path of Archiver. eg. /usr/bin/7z or 7z for Unix.")
